story: Thirteen-year-old Lily had to keep her VR helmet in school mode until homework was done. For her assignment she opened her mom’s 2020 Instagram: a graduation screen full of tiny video squares, many men with beards. Actually, one of the tiny squares in that grid was Lily’s father. She scrolled, wrote an essay calling that era reckless—people even hugged to show emotion—and, with a sigh, prepared to ping her mom that she’d finished.
implausible_knowledge: Actually, one of the tiny squares in that grid was Lily’s father.
question: After finishing her homework and connecting with her mom, what will Lily most likely say or do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Ask her mom if the bearded man in the graduation grid is her father.
answer_without_knowledge: Ask her mom to switch her helmet to leisure mode so she can join her friends.
